def negative_llm_full_response_loaded_into_memory():
    rule_id = "llm_full_response_loaded_into_memory"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Large LLM responses are loaded fully into memory instead of streamed or incrementally consumed."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
